typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-[#0A0A0A] leading-[1.1]
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0A0A0A] leading-tight
typography.label: text-sm font-bold tracking-[0.1em] uppercase text-[#0A0A0A]

visual_style.surface: bg-white border-2 sm:border-3 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(10,10,10,1)] p-8 sm:p-12
visual_style.button_primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-[#FFD600] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold border-2 sm:border-3 border-[#0A0A0A] px-8 py-4 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(10,10,10,1)] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(10,10,10,1)] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] transition-all
visual_style.button_secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold border-2 sm:border-3 border-[#0A0A0A] px-8 py-4 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(10,10,10,1)] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(10,10,10,1)] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:translate-y-[2px] transition-all

components.header: Sticky nav with bg-white border-b-2 border-[#0A0A0A]. Include logo, nav links (hidden on mobile), WhatsApp CTA, and Book CTA.
components.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Left side text-heavy (H1, Trust line, CTAs). Right side hero image inside a bordered container with sharp shadow.
components.services_bento: Tetris Grid. Large featured service, medium services. High contrast backgrounds (mix of white and #FFD600) for bento items.
components.why_choose_us: List of benefits with large icons (Lucide or Phosphor) in hard-bordered boxes.
components.book_lesson_form: Uses Shadcn forms. Inputs must have border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-none focus:ring-[#FFD600] focus:ring-offset-0. Service type select dropdown.
components.contact_info: Include 1 Goldman Street address, phone 073 403 7108, and operating hours in a structured bento card.
components.footer: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white border-t-4 border-[#FFD600]. Clean layout. Huge 'RAY DRIVING SCHOOL' text at the bottom.

images.description: Hands on steering wheel for defensive driving.

icons.style: stroke-width: 2.5 or 3 for a bolder, matching look to the neo-brutalist theme.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use HTML/Tailwind over basic Shadcn cards to achieve the neo-brutalist shadow and border styles specified.
Use raw JSON string for styles. Apply the exact classes from 'visual_style' for buttons and cards.
For the 'Book a Lesson' form, use Shadcn Form, Input, Select, and Textarea, but heavily customize their Tailwind classes to have thick borders, sharp corners (rounded-none), and sharp shadows.
Ensure 'Call' and 'WhatsApp' buttons include the phone number 073 403 7108.
Never use placehold.it or generic placeholders. Only use the images provided in this JSON.
Do NOT add a pricing section.
Make sure the typography combinations (Outfit and Work Sans) are imported via Google Fonts in index.css or layout.
